scripts.test:chat-room-lifecycle: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --outDir .tmp/tests tests/chat-room-lifecycle.test.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/chat-room-lifecycle.test.js
scripts.test:ai-chat-ui: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --outDir .tmp/tests tests/ai-chat-ui.test.ts && node --test .tmp/tests/ai-chat-ui.test.js
